title: F8thful Font
body:
![F8thful Font Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/f8thful-font/logo.webp)
## The font from F8thful
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/f8thful-font)

This pack adds the font from the F8thful resource pack so that you can use it on its own without using the rest of the pack!
